missionstate.description: Kill the academy students and recover the kunais and shurikens for Shiro.
You delivered the items to Shiro, and he taught you the combat jutsus Kogeki and Kyudan.
Capture the Dangai Butterfly for Komatsu.
You have captured the Dangai Butterfly! Return to Komatsu.
Komatsu is impressed with your capture skills. He has taught you the support jutsu Hashiri.
Komatsu has taught you the principle of the Hashiri skill.

mission.name: Bringing the Fish Back to Life

missionstate.description: Akane told you that Daki might help you obtain a fish. You should find him.
Daki is an experienced fisherman from the region. He may be able to help you on your journey, but first you must retrieve the hat he left at his house.
The hat was inside the house, right next to the aquarium. Who would have thought?
You have obtained the fish from Daki. Now you must return to Akane, who awaits to teach you the jutsu.
Akane has given you a glove to aid you in learning the jutsu.
You have managed to revive the fish. Now, you should speak with Akane.
Akane beams with pride. Thanks to your efforts, you are now ready to walk the path of a Medical Ninja.

mission.name: Recovering the fragments of the Nindo Coins

missionstate.description: I found a fragment of a Nindo coin in a peculiar location.
I found another coin fragment in a peculiar place, how strange.
Another coin fragment! The people here are so forgetful.
What luck! Finding 4 fragments of lost coins is, at the very least, a sign of good luck, isn't it?
Shizune doesn't really know me yet, but she decided to give me a chance. I need to bring her 10 Actires flowers, 10 Asleep flowers, and 10 Sunny flowers.
I managed to deliver the flowers to Shizune, and it feels like I've earned a little more of her trust.
Shizune told me that she need some seeds to create a new medicine. She said that needs 10 seeds of Actires, Asleep and Sunny.
It was difficult, but I gave her those seeds. I hope she can now create a new medicine.
You have joined the Uchiha clan! Fugaku Uchiha welcomed you and taught you the fire technique Katon Goukakyuu. He mentioned that more training awaits when you reach level 40.

mission.name: Uchiha Way 1: The Sound of a Thousand Birds

missionstate.description: Fugaku sent you to train with Kakashi Hatake, the Copy Ninja. Go speak with him and see what he has to say.

Kakashi noticed your aptitude for Raiton, but your lack of control is causing internal damage. You must learn discipline before power. He asked you to train your control using Lightning Release technique in the movable training logs and, when ready, face him in a 1v1 battle.

You completed Kakashi's harsh training: hit fast-moving targets with precision, witnessed disturbing Genjutsu illusions showing the consequences of losing control, and defeated him by using Raiton strategically. Kakashi praised your progress. Report back to Fugaku to understand why you can't use Chidori.

Fugaku removed the seal Kakashi placed on Chidori. The lightning blade technique is now fully yours. He warned: 'Use it with discipline.' The sound of a thousand birds chirps in your hand when you channel Raiton chakra. (Technique learned: Chidori)

mission.name: Uchiha Way 2: The Eyes That Never Sleep

missionstate.description: Fugaku assigned you a dangerous task: return to the ruins of the Uchiha clan compound. He granted you chakra access to bypass the seals. Search for truths buried in the past. He hinted that under the right circumstances, you might awaken your Sharingan. Explore the ruins carefully.

You survived the echoes of the ruins and witnessed the painful memories of the massacre etched into the walls. The emotional trauma triggered the awakening of your Sharingan! Your eyes have changed, but you still don't know how to activate it at will. Return to Fugaku to report what happened.

Fugaku acknowledged your awakening: 'You survived the echoes and awakened your Sharingan. Good. But awakening is only the first step. Mastery requires far more than emotion.' He also taught you how to activate it properly. Your crimson eyes now see the world differently. (Technique learned: Sharingan)

The Hokage issued a direct order through Fugaku: capture Orochimaru, one of the Legendary Sannin, alive. He possesses forbidden knowledge the village needs. Intel suggests he's hiding between Konoha and the Sound Village. This is a dangerous mission. Locate Orochimaru and bring him to justice.

You found Orochimaru and fought him, managing to corner the Sannin. But it was a trap. He never intended to fight seriously. Instead, he planted 'seeds of doubt' about the Uchiha massacre, hinting that the truth is not what you were told. He marked you with a curse seal as a 'gift' and escaped, laughing. The mission failed. Return to Fugaku with the bitter news.

Fugaku was furious: 'You failed to capture him and allowed yourself to be manipulated. You have brought disgrace upon the Uchiha name. Learn from this.' Despite the failure, he taught you Kirin, the legendary lightning technique that commands the very thunder itself. Perhaps power will help you avoid future failures. (Technique learned: Kirin)

mission.name: Uchiha Way 4: The Truth That Burns

missionstate.description: Fugaku relayed a message from the Hokage: he believes the truth behind the Uchiha massacre is more complex than the official story. The Hokage requested your presence personally. This is highly unusual. Go to the Hokage's office and hear what he has to say. Something important is about to be revealed.

You listened to the Hokage's request and was told that the Uchiha clan massacre wans't just a random crime. He asked you to return to the ruins, now that you have your Sharingan awakened, and try to discover new information about what happened there. Documents or even echoes may show you the bigger view.

You returned and reported what you have discovered, and with the Hokage inside information, the whole picture was finally revealed: The massacre was a pre-made crime, a village-sanctioned action to prevent a coup d'état. The Hokage didn't tell you who was involved, but you already know, because you saw the echoes: Uchiha Itachi, Uchiha 'Madara' and Danzou, leader of the ANBU SpecOps. This truth is heavy to bear, but you now understand the full history of your clan. Return to Fugaku with this knowledge.

Fugaku listened intently to everything you revealed. 'So, this is the truth about our clan's past. This knowledge will forge your path forward.' You also told him about the black flames you have casted in you 'fight'. He reveal that those black flames is a powerful jutsu that can only be used with the awakened Mangekyou Sharingan. He taught you carefully how to control those flames. Now you can freely use Amaterasu, the powerful ocular technique that only those with Mangekyou Sharingan can use.But he warned: 'The Mangekyou's power comes at a great cost. Excessive use leads to blindness. Power without restraint destroys its wielder.' (Technique learned: Amaterasu)
